translations.fr: Je mange du chocolat en cachette.
translations.hi: मैं चुपके से चॉकलेट खाता हूँ.
translations.ja: こっそりチョコレートを食べている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; serves as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; predicates the action performed by the subject.
Manner adverb modifying the verb, indicating the way the action is carried out.
Common noun functioning as the direct object (accusative) of the verb, denoting what is eaten.

sentences.target: Er schaut heimlich auf mein Handy.

translations.de: Er schaut heimlich auf mein Handy.
translations.en: He secretly looks at my phone.
translations.es: Él mira mi teléfono a escondidas.
translations.fr: Il regarde mon téléphone en cachette.
translations.it: Guarda di nascosto il mio telefono.
translations.ru: Он тайком заглядывает в мой телефон.
translations.pt: Ele olha meu celular às escondidas.
translations.vi: Anh ấy lén nhìn điện thoại của tôi.
translations.nl: Hij kijkt stiekem op mijn telefoon.
translations.uk: Він потайки заглядає в мій телефон.
translations.hi: वह चुपके से मेरा फोन देखता है.
translations.pl: On potajemnie zagląda do mojego telefonu.
translations.nb: Han ser i smug på telefonen min.
translations.sv: Han kollar på min mobil i smyg.
translations.ro: El se uită pe furiș la telefonul meu.
translations.cs: Tajně se dívá na můj telefon.
translations.da: Han kigger på min telefon i smug.
translations.ja: 彼はこっそり私のスマホを見ている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicates the action of looking.
Manner adverb modifying the verb, indicating the action is done secretly.
Preposition heading the prepositional phrase 'auf mein Handy'; selects an accusative complement indicating the target of the gaze.
Possessive determiner modifying 'Handy' within the prepositional object.
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'auf', forming the prepositional object.

sentences.target: Wir planen heimlich eine kleine Überraschung.

translations.de: Wir planen heimlich eine kleine Überraschung.
translations.en: We are secretly planning a little surprise.
translations.es: Estamos preparando en secreto una pequeña sorpresa.
translations.fr: On prépare en cachette une petite surprise.
translations.it: Stiamo organizzando di nascosto una piccola sorpresa.
translations.ko: 우리는 몰래 작은 깜짝 선물을 준비하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在偷偷准备一个小惊喜。
translations.yue: 我哋偷偷準備一個小驚喜。
translations.pt: Estamos planejando em segredo uma pequena surpresa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang âm thầm chuẩn bị một bất ngờ nhỏ.
translations.nl: We plannen stiekem een kleine verrassing.
translations.hi: हम चुपके से एक छोटी-सी सरप्राइज की योजना बना रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi planlegger en liten overraskelse i smug.
translations.id: Kami diam-diam merencanakan sebuah kejutan kecil.
translations.sv: Vi planerar en liten överraskning i smyg.
translations.ro: Pregătim pe furiș o mică surpriză.
translations.da: Vi planlægger en lille overraskelse i smug.
translations.ja: 私たちはこっそり小さなサプライズを計画しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; predicates the act of planning.
Manner adverb modifying the verb, indicating secrecy of the action.
Indefinite article introducing the noun phrase as a direct object (accusative, feminine singular).
Attributive adjective modifying 'Überraschung'; agrees with the noun (feminine accusative singular).
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'planen'.

sentences.target: Die Kinder flüstern heimlich unter der Decke.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈflʏstɐn ˈhaɪ̯mlɪç ˈʊntɐ deːɐ ˈdɛkə/

translations.de: Die Kinder flüstern heimlich unter der Decke.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈflʏstɐn ˈhaɪ̯mlɪç ˈʊntɐ deːɐ ˈdɛkə/
translations.en: The kids whisper secretly under the blanket.
translations.es: Los niños susurran a escondidas bajo la manta.
translations.fr: Les enfants chuchotent en cachette sous la couverture.
translations.it: I bambini sussurrano di nascosto sotto la coperta.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在被子里偷偷小声说话。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺被窩入面偷偷細聲講嘢。
translations.pt: As crianças sussurram às escondidas debaixo do cobertor.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ thì thầm lén dưới chăn.
translations.nl: De kinderen fluisteren stiekem onder de deken.
translations.hu: A gyerekek titokban suttognak a takaró alatt.
translations.hi: बच्चे चुपके से कंबल के नीचे फुसफुसाते हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά ψιθυρίζουν κρυφά κάτω από την κουβέρτα.
translations.nb: Barna hvisker i smug under dyna.
translations.id: Anak-anak berbisik diam-diam di bawah selimut.
translations.sv: Barnen viskar i smyg under täcket.
translations.ro: Copiii șușotesc pe furiș sub pătură.
translations.cs: Děti si potají šeptají pod peřinou.
translations.da: Børnene hvisker i smug under dynen.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは布団の中でこっそりささやいている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the noun phrase 'Die Kinder' as nominative plural subject.
Common noun, plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; predicates the action performed by the subject.
Manner adverb modifying the verb, indicating the whispering is done secretly.
Preposition heading the prepositional phrase 'unter der Decke'; governs the dative and indicates location.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Decke' within the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'unter' (dative), completing the PP.
